ValidationRule.description: Billing Contact and Sold to Contact fields are mandatory on New Sale business type Quotes.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(Quote_Business_Type__c) = 'New Sale', OR( ISBLANK(Billing_Contact__c), ISBLANK(Sold_to_Contact__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 'Billing Contact' and 'Sold to Contact' are required on the 'New Sales' quote type
